title: Charred Juicy Australian Meat Barbie
description: A hangover-cure dish featuring fresh thyme and a spicy kick from bhuna. Perfect for a hearty Australian meal.
instructions: Heat the grill to medium-high heat, about 200°C.
Pat the rump steak dry with paper towels.
Season the steak with salt and pepper.
Grill the steak for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the steak is cooking, heat the olive oil in a small pan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the bhuna curry sauce and cook for a further 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Once the steak is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
To serve, place the sliced steak on a plate, spoon the bhuna sauce over the top, and sprinkle with fresh thyme.
